chunks.text: Hello friends, Welcome to Gate Smashers

text: Hello friends, Welcome to Gate Smashers In this video I am going to explain how to construct DFA And I will discuss two examples related to this in this video Which is very beneficial for your competitive exams, even for your college or university level exams So guys quickly like the video and subscribe to the channel if you haven't done it yet And please press the bell button so that you get all the latest notifications So let's start Construct a DFA which accept a language of all strings containing A My first question is that containing A And the second question we will discuss is end with A First of all, let me tell you what is DFA I have already explained the video on this and its link is given in the description box So you must check that video once so that you get to know the introduction to DFA What is actually DFA Because I will not explain that point again and again in this So here we start directly containing A What does containing A mean? That all strings in the language should be such that A should come inside it So you always start with minimum What does minimum mean? Which will be the minimum string? Which will be the smallest string? A itself Your smallest string will be A What else can it be? Let's suppose we have AA See, A is coming inside AA AAA A is coming inside this too BA A is coming? Yes Containing A means wherever A is In starting, in end, in middle, anywhere, just A should come AB AB, AB Like this BA, BA Multiple possibilities are there So is the language finite or infinite here? Infinite Now let's see how we design its DFA So let's start What is the starting state I have? Q0 What is Q0? It is the starting state Now whenever you design DFA, what should you do? First of all, design for minimum string What is the minimum to minimum? A Means A should come, there is no one smaller than this So to accept single A You will reach on A, let's suppose on Q01 So if you reach on Q1 So what do you make Q1? Make final state So as soon as single A comes From starting state, as soon as A comes As soon as A comes, you reach Q1 And A is accepted Means your finite automata is working Now filling the blanks What is the meaning of filling the blanks? That we have made for single A Now multiple A, BA, AB How to complete all these combinations ahead? What you have to do for that? In DFA, filling the blanks Filling the blanks means Where did Q0 go on A? It went here And the submission we have I will tell you the alphabet There are only two alphabets A and B Because you are looking carefully in the question Sometimes A, B, C are also given Extra is also given So here I have only two symbols A and B So it went here for A But where will Q0 go for B? Where should it go for B? For B, we can either make it here This is one possibility What is the second possibility? I say that it is going here for B too This is also a possibility What is the third possibility? I put it in the trap state That it goes in the trap state for B So first of all see Why should we take it in the trap state? Because if BA comes So see what is my question? Containing A So A is coming in B's A But if you put B in the trap state Then it will be trapped It will never accept BA If you do it like this As we explained starting with A So in starting with A If you make it like this Then BA will go here Means it will go on Q2 So it will never accept But it should accept So to make it accept Obviously I don't have to make a trap state You have to apply logic like this Second If I put B here like this That it is going here for A It is going here for B If it is going here for B Then B is also accepted alone It is accepted as soon as B comes So my question is wrong Containing A So it means I can't make this B So what was the third possibility? Put B in the self loop So put B in the self loop It is accepted So see BA will come It will be accepted B BA will come Run the self loop twice A is accepted Means these strings will be accepted Next Q1 Now see Q1 Where is it going for A and B? Where can it go for A and B? Either it can go here for A Or it can go in the trap state for A If I will send it in the trap state Then obviously there will be a mistake Why? If my string comes Let's suppose BAA B A A As soon as the next A comes It went in the trap state Why did it go in the trap state? A is also coming in BAA So containing A should be accepted So as much as A comes What does it mean as much as A comes? You put A in the trap state You make A a self loop Means as much as A comes At least we made it for A Apart from that, as much as A comes That should also be accepted Yes, that will also be accepted So where will it go for B? For B It can also go in the trap state It can go in the trap state for B If I send it in the trap state for B Then what will happen? Let's suppose if I have a string AA B A Can it come? Yes AABA So see A A B Where did it go in B? Let's suppose there is a trap state Q2 B And obviously the trap state always comes there And it goes on B itself A A B A This will not be accepted It did not come back on Q1 But it should come back on Q1 Why? Because A is coming in AABA So it should be accepted But it will not be accepted So to accept this B does not need to go in the trap state What you do? Send B here Send B here So if you send B here Then what will happen? If you send B here So let's suppose if A comes A B This can also come You will have to make this possibility You will have to apply this logic And it is easy to apply this logic You just have to make 2-4 DFAs So you will easily apply this logic So let's suppose we have AAB string So A is coming in it So see A A B A A B So it was not accepted It should have reached here on B But it will not reach here Because it stopped at Q0 So this string is not accepted But it should be accepted So what you have to do to make it accepted? Instead of making it here You make a self loop for A and B End of the story As many A's as you want As many B's as you want This becomes your simple DFA Which is containing A So this way you have to apply logic
